steps.title: Trace the sequence
steps.content: The text first states that gray wolves were eradicated from Yellowstone. It then explains the consequence: elk overpopulation damaged the ecosystem, leading scientists to recognize the wolf's importance and reintroduce it.

steps.title: Reject structure mismatches
steps.content: Choice A says the text offers potential solutions, but it describes one implemented solution. Choice C invents a claim about wolf population health. Choice D says the passage explains why wolves were eradicated, but it does not.

steps.title: Describe the whole structure
steps.content: The remaining choice captures the structure: the text mentions the wolf's elimination and then explains why restoration became necessary. The answer is B.
